title: Labour market forces and government intervention
summary: 9708 AS labour markets — wage determination, monopsony, unions, and minimum wage.
learningObjectives: Evaluate minimum wage and government policy.

simpleExplanation.title: Derived demand for labour
simpleExplanation.summary: Firms hire until MRP equals wage. Imperfect markets and policy shift equilibrium employment and wages.
steps: Monopsony: single buyer lowers wage below MRP.
Union bargaining can raise wages — employment effect depends.
National minimum wage: floor on wage rate.

sections.content: **Labour markets** (8.3) extend **factor markets**. Compare **competitive vs monopsony** diagrams.
